notes: Apify page lists pricing from $1.50 per 1,000 transcriptions.
Supports Instagram Reels, TikTok, YouTube Shorts, Facebook Reels, and Facebook Watch public videos.
The live input schema accepts start_urls as a string.
IGFU runs Instagram transcript batches URL by URL so every run matches the actor schema.
Output fields include sourceUrl, videoId, status, durationSec, transcript, detected_language, and timestamp.
